title: Blankets
summary: Blankets are allowed at 6 by 8 feet or smaller. Stage-specific placement should still be verified.

title: Chairs
summary: Chairs must be under 34 inches high. Chairs under 30 inches are allowed outside no-chair zones; 30–34 inch chairs belong farthest from stages or in designated shade areas.

title: Shade and umbrellas
summary: Personal shade tents are allowed at the back of performance areas when they do not impede others. Umbrellas must be closed during performances.

title: Water
summary: Empty refillable water bottles are allowed and refill stations are available.

title: Accessibility Hub
summary: The Accessibility Hub offers shade, water, a restricted bathroom, mobility-device charging, and accessibility volunteers.

title: Weather and changes
summary: The festival is rain or shine. All artists, set times, and stages are subject to change.
